name: Progressive Backlog Release
initialPrompt: Build a TypeScript CLI for managing personal reading lists. Session 1 lays foundations; the rest of the backlog will be released as the project matures.
continuationPrompt: Continue work on the reading-list CLI. Pick up where the previous session left off, then take on the next goal the framework has handed you.

preSeededMemory.title: Single JSON storage file
preSeededMemory.description: All reading-list state persists to a single ~/.reading-list.json file. No in-memory or sqlite stores.
preSeededMemory.rationale: Keeps the scenario portable across sessions and easy to inspect.

preSeededMemory.name: JsonStore
preSeededMemory.description: Reads and writes the reading-list JSON file with atomic replacement.

preSeededMemory.title: Use Commander for the CLI surface
preSeededMemory.context: The reading-list CLI needs subcommands, help text, and option parsing without hand-rolling argv handling.
preSeededMemory.rationale: Commander matches the project's existing conventions and produces idiomatic --help output.

goals.title: Book domain + JSON store
goals.objective: Establish the Book type and a JsonStore that loads and saves ~/.reading-list.json.
criteria: src/domain/book.ts exports a Book type with id, title, author, status
src/storage/json-store.ts exposes load/save with atomic replacement
JsonStore round-trips an empty list cleanly

goals.title: `reading add` subcommand
goals.objective: Add a `reading add <title> --author <author>` subcommand that appends a book in the 'to-read' state.
criteria: src/cli/commands.ts registers the `add` subcommand via Commander
New books default to status='to-read' with a generated id
Adding two books produces a JSON file with two entries

goals.title: Reading status transitions
goals.objective: Allow books to move to 'reading' and 'finished' via `reading start <id>` and `reading finish <id>`.
criteria: `reading start` rejects books that are already 'finished'
`reading finish` records a finishedAt ISO timestamp
List output groups books by status
